summary: Tested Business Day (Jornada) filter feature in Reports page. All 6 features working correctly: dropdown with jornadas, date auto-update, amber badge, cyan FileText button, and Reporte Z modal.
passed_tests: Página /reports carga correctamente con filtros de fecha y dropdown de Jornada
Dropdown 'Por Fecha Civil' muestra lista de jornadas disponibles del backend (7 options including default)
Al seleccionar una jornada, las fechas se actualizan automáticamente a la business_date
Badge amber aparece mostrando 'Jornada: 2026-02-23' cuando hay jornada seleccionada
Botón FileText (cyan) aparece para ver Reporte Z de la jornada seleccionada
Click en botón FileText abre modal de Reporte Z
Modal Reporte Z shows RESUMEN DE VENTAS section
Modal Reporte Z shows DESGLOSE POR FORMA DE PAGO section
Modal Reporte Z shows CUADRE DE CAJA section
Modal Reporte Z has Imprimir button
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.js lines 444-449: Business day state properly initialized (businessDays, selectedBusinessDay, loadingBusinessDays, reportZOpen, reportZDayId)
Reports.js lines 498-506: Business days fetched via businessDaysAPI.history({ limit: 30 }) on page load
Reports.js lines 511-520: handleSelectBusinessDay correctly updates dateRange to use business_date
Reports.js lines 1719-1764: UI implementation correct with Sun icon, dropdown, amber badge, and cyan FileText button

features_verified.reports_page_load: PASS - Page loads with date filters and Jornada dropdown
features_verified.jornada_dropdown: PASS - Shows 'Por Fecha Civil' default + 6 jornadas from backend
features_verified.date_auto_update: PASS - Selecting jornada updates both date fields to business_date
features_verified.amber_badge: PASS - Shows 'Jornada: 2026-02-23' in amber colored badge
features_verified.filetext_button: PASS - Cyan FileText button appears with title='Ver Reporte Z'
features_verified.report_z_modal: PASS - Opens modal with REPORTE Z - CIERRE DE DÍA title and all sections

seed_data_creation: None - used existing business days (JORNADA-2026-00006 open)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Business Day (Jornada) filter feature in Reports page fully tested. The dropdown fetches 30 most recent jornadas from /api/business-days/history. Selecting a jornada auto-updates date filters and shows amber badge + cyan Reporte Z button. All UI elements have proper data-testid: business-day-filter for dropdown.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are real
